scripts.preinstall: node -e "const {existsSync, unlinkSync} = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json', 'yarn.lock'].forEach((file) => { if (existsSync(file)) unlinkSync(file); }); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent?.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
